updates.note: The state government issued a formal notification on May 14, 2026 lifting all restrictions on the interstate movement of agricultural produce, including potato, food grains, vegetables, and animal products. CM Suvendu Adhikari had announced this decision on May 13, stating the full order would be cleared in the cabinet meeting on May 18. The previous government had imposed the ban citing domestic supply concerns; farmers and traders had long criticized it for limiting their market access and profits. ↗ Times of India | May 14, 2026
